plugins.name: kernel
plugins.description: Durable project memory, bounded JSON handoffs, engineering skills, and independent verification for Claude Code and Codex. KERNEL 8.6.0 adds the knowledge-graph skill: a deterministic, local, free code graph (graphify) that cuts agent orientation-token cost, with opt-in post-commit freshness. 8.5.x: config-guard fix, learning graph, semantic recall, six-threat security guard.
